summary: Full testing of Demands module (Gestion de la Demande). All 14 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified: Kanban with 6 columns, Table view, Create demand modal, Workflow (qualify/prioritize/accept/refuse), ConvertProjectModal with pre-filled data, READ_ONLY access restrictions, Filters by status and urgency.
critical_code_review_comments: The Acceptée column showed 0 demands after seed because the CRM demand was already 'Convertie' in the seeded data (priority_score: 78, but status shown as 'acceptee' in seed - this is correct). The Kanban counter showed 0 Acceptées initially which may confuse users, but it's accurate.
Table view has a date sort select (Date création) visible, which is a nice added feature not originally in specs.
No missing data-testid attributes - all workflow buttons properly tagged.
test_credentials: PMO: pmo@altair.fr / Pmo1234!, Admin: admin@altair.fr / Admin1234!, Viewer: viewer@altair.fr / View1234!
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/demands/seed. Also created TEST_Convert_Demand via API to test ConvertProjectModal (cleaned up after test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demands module fully functional. Backend: 100% pass rate. Frontend: Kanban (6 cols), Table view, Create modal, Workflow (qualify→prioritize→accept→refuse→convert), ConvertProjectModal, READ_ONLY RBAC, filters all working. Seed data at /api/demands/seed. Workflow tested via card click → modal → action buttons.
